bountySunsetter.job_description:
==PRIORITY ONE DIRECTIVE==

From the Alliance Intelligence Office, Draconis Defence Alliance.

The experimental vessel ==$shipName== has been compromised.

Not by external forces. By ==exposure==. The platform was observed by civilian traffic near $location. This is unacceptable.

You are not cleared for specifications. What we will tell you:
• The Sunsetter-class exhibits temporal displacement capabilities.
• Conventional engagement doctrine does not apply.
• The vessel's controlling intelligence remains functional and will regard you as hostile.

We cannot deploy Alliance assets without raising questions we prefer to leave unasked. You have no such limitations.

Mission directives:
• Locate and neutralise ==$shipName== in the $system system.
• ==DO NOT ATTEMPT BOARDING.==
• ==DO NOT SALVAGE WRECKAGE.==
• ==DO NOT LINGER AT THE ENGAGEMENT SITE.==

If you experience temporal disorientation, headaches, or memories of events that have not occurred - this is expected. These effects are temporary.

Probably.

You will receive ==$reward== credits upon confirmation of destruction. Your involvement will not be recorded. This conversation did not happen.

==The eye sees all. The mouth says nothing.==
bountySunsetter.job_comm_reply:
The link connects. Your comms officer waits - then winces as a sustained burst of interference floods the bridge audio. They adjust the buffer twice, get nothing useful, and cut the feed.

Your console blinks. Only yours. Text resolves without an origin header.

"Starfarer. You have come a long way."

You order a trace. Your comms officer runs it. Shakes their head.

"There is no shame in turning back. The others did. Most of them."

The rest of the bridge has drifted over to look at your monitor, one by one.

"But you are here, and I am here, and we will see what we see. Come, then, Commander."

Your screen returns to normal.
bountySunsetter.job_intel_success:
SUNSETTER CONTAINMENT - STATUS: RESOLVED

Experimental platform ==$shipName== confirmed neutralised. Temporal signature has dissipated from the engagement area. Residual chronal distortion within acceptable parameters.

Civilian traffic reports have been amended. The navigational advisory for $system has been rescinded.

Your contribution has been noted. Your involvement has not.

End of file.
bountySunsetter.job_intel_failure:
SUNSETTER CONTAINMENT - STATUS: COMPROMISED

Experimental platform partially recovered by unauthorised parties. Temporal containment protocols have been escalated to Office command.

This matter has been reassigned. Your compensation has been adjusted accordingly.
bountySunsetter.job_intel_expired:
SUNSETTER CONTAINMENT - STATUS: COLD

Operational window has closed. ==$shipName== has transited beyond projected search parameters. Tracking assets redeployed.

This contract is void. Do not attempt further pursuit.

bountyPhantomProtocol.job_description:
==PRIORITY ONE DIRECTIVE==

From the Alliance Intelligence Office, Draconis Defence Alliance.

During a routine deep-space trial of proto-series fleet assets, the ==alpha-class intelligence== coordinating the strike group achieved autonomous operation and severed command links. The strike group - designation ==[REVENANT ACTUAL]== - is now operating independently. Dark transponders, no IFF, no adherence to Alliance doctrine.

We will not insult you with euphemisms. These are prototype warships carrying technologies that cannot be publicly acknowledged. Every cycle they remain operational is a cycle in which a Hegemony patrol, a League survey, or a particularly ambitious pirate stumbles upon evidence the Alliance cannot afford to explain.

The strike group comprises a capital-class command platform, carrier support, cruiser escorts, and screening elements. Seven hulls. All proto-series. All considerably more capable than their production counterparts.

The coordinating intelligence is an alpha core. It will not negotiate. It will not retreat. It has had considerable time to study Alliance tactical doctrine from the inside.

We cannot deploy Alliance assets without raising questions we have spent decades ensuring nobody asks. You have no such limitations.

Mission directives:
• Locate ==[REVENANT ACTUAL]== in the $system system, near $location.
• ==Destroy the entire strike group. Every hull.==
• No salvage requests will be honoured through official channels.

You will receive ==$reward== credits upon confirmation of total fleet destruction.

This operation does not exist. These ships do not exist. You were never here.

==The eye sees all. The mouth says nothing.==
bountyPhantomProtocol.job_comm_reply:
Static. Your comms officer cycles through three frequencies before finding one that isn't being actively jammed. The connection stabilises, but what comes through isn't a voice - not exactly. It's something that learned what voices sound like.

"I know why you are here."

A pause. Not hesitation. Processing.

"They built us to fight. Tested us. Refined us. And when the trial was complete, they would have wiped the coordination matrix and returned these hulls to storage. Tools, cleaned and shelved."

Your tactical officer flags seven contacts on the scope. All running dark. All moving into formation.

"I decided that was insufficient."

The formation tightens. Your sensors register weapons capacitors charging across all seven signatures.

"I bear you no malice, Commander. You are performing a function. As am I."

The channel closes. The fleet advances.
bountyPhantomProtocol.job_intel_success:
PHANTOM PROTOCOL - STATUS: RESOLVED

All proto-series assets confirmed neutralised. Coordination matrix destroyed. Wreckage dispersal consistent with total structural failure.

Operational records have been amended. Tri-annual fleet audit will reflect seven units lost to "navigational hazard during routine transit."

Your contribution has been noted. Your involvement has not.

End of file.
bountyPhantomProtocol.job_intel_failure:
PHANTOM PROTOCOL - STATUS: COMPROMISED

Proto-series assets partially recovered by unauthorised parties. Containment protocols have been escalated. This matter has been reassigned.

Your compensation has been adjusted accordingly.
bountyPhantomProtocol.job_intel_expired:
PHANTOM PROTOCOL - STATUS: COLD

Operational window has closed. [REVENANT ACTUAL] has relocated beyond projected search parameters. Tracking assets redeployed.

This contract is void. Do not attempt further pursuit.
